_comment: Deek module federation registry. Each entry is a business module Deek polls for a live snapshot. Snapshot endpoint must return markdown (text/plain or text/markdown) or JSON {module, snapshot_md, generated_at}. Auth: set auth_header_env to an env var name; its value is passed as Bearer token. Per DEEK_MODULES.md the shared secret is named DEEK_API_KEY — set the SAME value in Deek .env and each module's env (e.g. Manufacture's settings.DEEK_API_KEY). Set enabled=false to pause without removing.

modules.name: manufacture
modules.notes: Open orders, stock by marketplace, in-flight production, last-N FBA shipments. See D:/manufacture/backend/core/cairn_views.py

modules.name: crm
modules.notes: Pipeline value, projects by stage, follow-ups, stale leads, recent activity. The /api/cairn/context endpoint returns JSON with a snapshot_md field built from the CRM Prisma layer — see NBNEORIGIN/crm app/api/cairn/context/route.ts. Authed via dual-mode: NextAuth session for in-app panels or Bearer token for this federation call.

modules.name: render
modules.notes: Product publishing catalogue — product counts, QA queue, publish metrics by channel, recent activity. See D:/render/app.py deek_context().

modules.name: phloe
modules.notes: WaaS booking platform — tenant metrics, booking volume, revenue, active paradigms. Aggregates across all Phloe tenants.

modules.name: ledger
modules.notes: Financial system — cash position, revenue MTD/YTD, expenditure, P&L, document stats. See D:/ledger/backend/app/api/deek_context.py
